title: March 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 28''' is the 87th day of the year (88th in leap years). There are 278 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Joel McNeely]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 57|''Star Wars Weekly'' 57]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[New Allies, New Enemies]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 41|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 41]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Pilot]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Queen]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 28|''Star Wars'' (1998) 28]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 81|''Star Wars Insider'' 81]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 10|''Legacy'' (2006) 10]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Legacy of the Force'']] released.
*[[2018]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 18|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 18]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 8|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 8]] published.
*[[2022]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Coruscant|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Coruscant]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[Shadow of the Sith]]'' reprinted in paperback.
<noinclude>
